name: safeline-waf
description: OctoBus package for Chaitin SafeLine WAF detection log, IP group, block, unblock, and detector state APIs.

Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.name: delete-ip-group-items
Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.description: Remove targets from a SafeLine IP group.

Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.name: add-ip-group-items
Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.description: Add targets to a SafeLine IP group.

Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.name: block-ip
Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.description: Block IPs through a SafeLine IP group.

Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.name: unblock-ip
Chaitin_WAF_SAFELINE.Chaitin_WAF_SAFELIN.description: Unblock IPs through a SafeLine IP group.
